statement.en: Code and dataset for manuscript "A Heteroscedastic Neural Network-based Turbulent Heat Flux Parameterization and Its Applications to an Ocean Modeling of the Tropical Pacific"
statement.summary: This project includes the model code and observed heat flux data involved in the manuscript "A Heteroscedastic Neural Network-based Turbulent Heat Flux Parameterization and Its Applications to an Ocean Modeling of the Tropical Pacific".

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Provisional research artifact (preprint dated 2026-04-25, future-dated). Code and dataset represent empirical validation in progress—not yet peer-reviewed publication. Heteroscedastic NN parameterization is methodologically sound but application-specific; generalizability to other ocean regions/climates remains under investigation. Status: 'not yet validated' per standard preprint classification.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 乱流の不確実性を捉えた熱流束は、期待値と局所的な揺らぎの平方根の対話として現れる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: ニューラルネットワークが海洋の乱流を「聴く」—中心の確定性と周辺の不確定性が共存する。
